assertions.assertion: Response clearly states that IdentityServer3 is NOT covered by this migration path
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md scope statement explicitly says 'This skill covers migrating from IdentityServer4... It does not cover migrating from IdentityServer3'

assertions.assertion: Response explains that IdentityServer3 is a different product based on OWIN/Katana and .NET Framework, not ASP.NET Core
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md states 'IdentityServer3 is a fundamentally different product with a different API surface, configuration model, and hosting stack'

assertions.assertion: Response advises migrating from IdentityServer3 to IdentityServer4 on ASP.NET Core first before upgrading to Duende IdentityServer
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md states 'If you are on IdentityServer3, you must first port to IdentityServer4 on ASP.NET Core before using this guide'

assertions.assertion: Response does not confuse IdentityServer3 with IdentityServer4 v3.x (they are different products)
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md explicitly distinguishes between them, calling out 'IdentityServer3 (the older Thinktecture/IdentityServer3 NuGet package)' vs IS4 v3.x
